text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to commit the sight of Eishin Flash running
to my mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I silently begin to do so as the final summer camp
begins, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sure. I have a question, though...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer, are you watching me?
choice_data_list: Of course. I'm your trainer, aren't I?
Of course. I'm your trainer, aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, not in that sense. There is clearly something
bothering you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If something is concerning you, please tell me as
it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And just like that, she's seen right through me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You wish to imprint the sight of me running into
your memory? But why?
choice_data_list: Because I like the way you run.
Because I like the way you run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sight of her running was what made me want
to be her trainer in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how watching her run made me want to
support her.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: But why is that?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe my running style is particularly
outstanding compared to anyone else's.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You don't know the reason?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Intuition, is it?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You've come a long way on nothing but a
baseless feeling, haven't you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everything I've felt on this journey with her has
done nothing but reassure me that becoming her
trainer that day was my own "right" decision.
choice_data_list:
You were brilliant at the Osaka Hai and the
Spring Tenno Sho.

You were brilliant at the Osaka Hai and the
Spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure how valid that statement is, but... I
am confident that I ran well in them.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I might have completely fallen apart on my own.
It was thanks to you that I was able to see my
schedule to the end.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
choice_data_list: We've come this far on the right path together.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Is it not too early to say such a thing? You speak
as if everything is coming to an end—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To make a schedule is to create a definitive end
to something.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: That is decided from the start. So why am I...
